violations.text: The handle on the one door refrigerator located on the cooking line was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025

The condensate from the walk in refrigeration unit is draining onto the floor in the walk in cooler. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. The drain pipe was observed damaged; establishment must fix drain pipe. New Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2025
The ceiling tiles in the kitchen area were observed missing/ in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils Ice Machine were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice Machine Contents were voluntarily disposed of. Ice machine in not to be used until it has been cleaned and sanitized. Establishment is to provide a photo of cleaned and sanitized ice machine to DOH. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024
Pasteurized eggs were not being used for under cooked eggs cooked to order. Pasteurized eggs must be used when serving highly susceptible populations. New Violation. Correct By: 11/08/2024

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2024
The handle on the one door refrigerator located on the cooking line was not in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/07/2024

Some cutting boards in the kitchen area are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 08/23/2023

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in beverage service area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. New Violation. Correct By: 08/09/2023
